full_text:
Wei Kang (Yuanjiang) 韋康 (元將)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Kang (韋康), styledYuanjiang (元將), was born in Jingchao. Faced Ma Chao for eight months but with his people starving, surrendered. Ma Chao promptly executed him. Wei Kang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wei Kang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
